verdicts.title: UNAUDITED HIGH-TVL PROTOCOL
verdicts.description: Protocol has $8,855,116,953 TVL without documented audit

vulnerabilities.title: Missing Access Control: pauseContract
vulnerabilities.description: Function 'pauseContract' appears sensitive but has no obvious access control modifier.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Add appropriate access control (onlyOwner, onlyAdmin, etc.)

vulnerabilities.title: Unchecked Arithmetic Block
vulnerabilities.description: Contract uses unchecked blocks. Verify overflow is intentional.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Ensure unchecked arithmetic cannot cause security issues

vulnerabilities.title: Timestamp Dependence
vulnerabilities.description: Contract logic depends on block.timestamp. Miners can manipulate slightly.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Avoid using timestamps for critical logic or use block.number

vulnerabilities.title: Potential Reentrancy (ETH) - Likely Protected
vulnerabilities.description: External call with ETH followed by state change detected. ReentrancyGuard is present - likely protected but verify manually.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Verify nonReentrant modifier is applied to this function

vulnerabilities.title: Delegatecall in Proxy Contract
vulnerabilities.description: Contract uses delegatecall as part of proxy pattern. Verify implementation address is properly controlled.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Ensure only authorized addresses can update implementation
